jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
